summary: Tested refactored backend (19 routers/ architecture) and QR scanner P0 fix. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend student portal and QR Check-in tab load without any crash or PAGE ERRORs. Admin dashboard loads correctly. All critical flows verified.

integration_issues.issue: Redirects to /login when accessed by admin — expected behavior since admin is not a parent role. Needs parent login to test.

critical_code_review_comments: Auth uses httpOnly cookies (not Bearer tokens) — correctly implemented with session-based auth
All 19 router files correctly registered and responding to API calls
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests pass. Backend refactoring to routers/ directory is verified working. QR scanner P0 crash fix confirmed — no PAGE ERRORs on student portal or QR Check-in tab. Auth uses httpOnly cookies (not Bearer tokens). Parent portal /parent-portal route only accessible with parent credentials (redirects non-parents to login).
rca_of_issue: None — all issues resolved. Previous P0: QR scanner scanFrame crash was fixed with try-catch + videoWidth > 0 guard. Confirmed no runtime errors on QR Check-in tab.
